author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for plugin trust boundary: signed manifests, origin allowlist, interactive first-install prompt, commit-SHA pinning, no-silent-latest. Per the 2026-04-18 comment, points 1 (SHA pinning) and 5 (no silent latest HEAD for Url source) shipped in bf79482. Per the 2026-05-19 comment, point 2 (ed25519 signed-manifest scheme) shipped via #521. Points 3 (origin allowlist) and 4 (interactive first-install prompt) remain — each is an architectural change with its own UX surface and config schema, owner-level scope. Tracked under cc-plugins-skills label going forward; concrete sub-issues (#521 signature impl, #538 plugin spec, #654/#655 plugin integration, #658 delisting, #664 managed skills) carry the remaining work.
